message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance tests (209 total)

New tests: view with aggregation, DISTINCT with NULLs, nested SELECT
columns, INSERT DEFAULT VALUES, UPDATE FROM subquery, complex CTE
operations, trigger side effects, float precision, multi-table join
aggregation, update from correlated subquery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
